mapper.select: select * from ai_chat_conversation where user_id = #{userId} and status = 'active' order by updated_at desc limit 1
mapper.update: update ai_chat_conversation set status = 'finalized', updated_at = now() where user_id = #{userId} and status = 'active'
mapper.insert: insert into ai_chat_conversation (user_id, draft_key, title, status, last_message_at) values (#{userId}, #{draftKey}, #{title}, #{status}, now())

insert into ai_chat_message (conversation_id, user_id, role, content, display_content, message_type, status, seq, metadata_json) values (#{conversationId}, #{userId}, #{role}, #{content}, #{displayContent}, #{messageType}, #{status}, #{seq}, #{metadataJson})
